name: Lischkoff and Pitts, P.C.
message: ABOUT OUR FIRMFor years, Lischkoff & Pitts, P.C. has been providing quality, personalized financial guidance to individuals and businesses. Our expertise ranges from tax compliance, management and accounting services to more in-depth services such as financial statements, financial planning, estates and trusts. Lischkoff & Pitts, P.C. is one of the leading tax and financial statement firms in the area. By combining our expertise, experience and the team mentality of our staff, we assure that every client receives the close analysis and attention they deserve. We are dedicated to high standards, hiring of seasoned professionals, and productive work ethic. https://www.lischkoffpitts.com
